title: Pi 5 + Hailo-10H (AI HAT+2, 40 TOPS): wire the hailo-genai LLM backend (community help wanted)
description:
Tracking issue for accelerated LLM inference on the Raspberry Pi 5 with the Hailo-10H (AI HAT+2, 40 TOPS). Community help wanted from anyone who has this exact hardware.

## Primary goal: zero-touch, auto-detected + auto-installed (parity with the RK3588 NPU)
The bar is the same as the Rockchip NPU experience: the user should NOT have to hand-configure anything. On install, taOS should detect the Hailo accelerator and set up its driver + runtime + backend automatically, exactly like it does for
